channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bin bag scattered across footpath for weeks, 10th March
item.description:
Bin bag has spilled contents everywhere. It’s been like this for 2 weeks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southgate Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and bed base dumped, 10th March
item.description:
There’s a mattress and bed base dumped as well as extra rubbish - this is a recurring issue and some kind of enforcement needs to happen.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Molash Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unfinished building works, duct sticking out of wall and pavement. Last week somebody caught it on their pram and it flicked back and hit me in the leg., 10th March
item.description:
These ducts have been sticking out of this wall for more than a year, last week when somebody was walking past and caught it on their pram, they flicked back and hit me and I had to go back home and get changed again for work, because they were wet and muddy.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lewes Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bags, 10th March
item.description:
About 4 or 5 black bags of rubbish
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochester Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead animal, 10th March
item.description:
Dead fox outside my property which in between 236 and 238 Burnt Ash Lane. BR1 5BS
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnt Ash Lane, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep Potholes northbound side, 10th March
item.description:
Deep Potholes northbound side - present at least a couple of weeks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandy Lane, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish.Again..., 10th March
item.description:
More fly tipping on this spot....

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rear of 180, School Lane, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping in Royston Field, 10th March
item.description:
Flytipping at top end of Royston Field on the Sainsburys side

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Franklin Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 10th March
item.description:
Untaxed car with multiple parking tickets parked on main road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, High Street, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large leather sofa and huge pallet, 10th March
item.description:
Large leather sofa and big wooden pallet alongside with additional waste dumped on the pavement leading to Windus Mews

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alkham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Continuous issue - urgent, 10th March
item.description:
I have to report rubbish left in the end of our street every week, sometimes twice a week. The council really needs to come up with a permanent solution for this. Please can this be collected urgently. Many thanks,

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albert Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped fridge freezer, 10th March
item.description:
This fridge freezer has been dumped over night.this has been left in the walkway between Anthony Road and Ridley Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anthony Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Workman have destroyed pavement, 10th March
item.description:
Workman are in the garden of 58 Abbey Grove, and whatever they are doing has smashed up the pavement and created a tripping hazard. They have also created a big slump just outside their gate and I am very concerned as my disabled neighbour regularly walks that route and she could easily hurt herself.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abbey Grove, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 10th March
item.description:
Fly tip

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wernbrook Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytpping, 10th March
item.description:
Flytipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wild's Rents, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bags with rubble and stones dumped on corner of St Kildas and Heathland Road N16, 10th March
item.description:
Black bags with rubble and stones dumped on corner of St Kildas and Heathland Road N16. This was already reported. Council came and removed the rest of the rubbish but left their.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Kildas Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: MF Stop wet white paint all ovee pavement and grafitti, 10th March
item.description:
Someone has spilled a large amout of white paint by the bus stop and someine has then used the paint to grafitti the glass of the shelter. MF outside IKEA GREENWICH. Not a goos look for London. Sorry to have to report. There is only one type of person who could possibly do this..
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackwall Tunnel Approach, East Greenwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light outside 169/171 Westmount Road, 10th March
item.description:
Street light is out on Westmount Road between numbers 169/171
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westmount Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blue ford fiesta abandoned since January, 10th March
item.description:
Blue ford fiesta reg: WR05SVG HAS been abandoned since the beginning of January 2026. No MOT which is probably why it’s been left there. Unfortunately it has become a nuisance due to lack of available spaces in the area
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Orchard Rise West, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 10th March
item.description:
Pothole is unavoidable
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dyneley Road, Chinbrook, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
